SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-02-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-02-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER ELLEN ROSENTHAL. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-02-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEREA, MONICA L. VALENCIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FEDEX CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
